summary: Tested Unavailabilities Module in Profile Page - All features working correctly. Backend API tests (15/15 passed) and UI testing verified: Tab 'Ausências', CRUD operations, 4 reason types, info box, and coach notifications.

tests: Tab 'Ausências' visible in profile page with CalendarOff icon
Success toast: 'Indisponibilidade criada! O treinador foi notificado.'
Doença / Consulta Médica - with Stethoscope icon (red color)
Atividades Escolares - with GraduationCap icon (blue color)
Outro Motivo - with AlertCircle icon (gray color)
ATIVAS / FUTURAS section shows active/future unavailabilities
Each item shows reason badge with icon
Edit button opens modal with 'EDITAR INDISPONIBILIDADE' title
Explains: 'As indisponibilidades aparecem no calendário da equipa'
Explains: 'O treinador é notificado quando criar uma nova ausência'
Explains: 'Não poderá ser convocado durante estes períodos'
Validation: start_date < end_date enforced (400 on invalid)

critical_code_review_comments: ProfilePage.jsx correctly implements Ausências tab with all required functionality
unavailabilitiesApi in api.js has all CRUD methods properly defined
Backend endpoints properly validate dates and ownership
Coach notification via push implemented on create
All data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: Test unavailabilities created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unavailabilities module fully tested: Tab 'Ausências' in profile, CRUD operations working, 4 reason types (ferias, doenca, escola, outro) with icons, ATIVAS/FUTURAS and HISTÓRICO sections, info box explaining functionality. All data-testid attributes: unavailability-tab, add-unavailability-btn, unavailability-modal, unavailability-start-date, unavailability-end-date, unavailability-reason-select, unavailability-notes, save-unavailability-btn, edit-unavailability-{id}, delete-unavailability-{id}.
